case_title: FRANK MORAN VS. CHERRY TECHNOLOGIES INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE: PARACORP INCORPORATED] SERVED JUN-05-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHERRY TECHNOLOGIES INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORAN, FRANK

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SERVICE FOR JAN-24-24 HEARING; RECEIVED --AFTER-- HEARING DATE** (**SEE SIGNATURE SECTION** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED JAN-22-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHERRY TECHNOLOGIES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN, FRANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHERRY TECHNOLOGIES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-25-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANK MORAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CHERRY TECHNOLOGIES INC. IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY SARAH GARRISON. PROOF OF SERVICE BY CERTIFIED MAILING ON DEFENDANT IS DEFECTIVE AS THERE IS NO SIGNATURE BY AN AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE DEFECTIVE SERVICE. DEFENDANT IS INFORMED THAT IT MUST MAKE A TIMELY REQUEST IF IT WISHES TO APPEAR AT NEXT COURT DATE VIA ZOOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU/S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK: PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF FRANK MORAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHERRY TECHNOLOGIES INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORAN, FRANK ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-13-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANK MORAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CHERRY TECHNOLOGIES INC.
